body:
## Summary
- Refresh README with Online Demo section (Vultr instance)
- Add 7 meeting notes (Apr 12 – May 13) covering all 135 PRs
- Add frontend spec, proposal, scoring contract test
- Move `calc.py` and `vultr-startup.sh` from `docs/` / `tools/` into `scripts/`
- Delete obsolete docs: old PvE drafts, `requirement.md`, old logo PNG
- Update 14 documentation files (api, socket, state-machine, testing, card-abstractions, etc.)
- Minor fixes: Dockerfile, routes, leaderboard test, lobby/leaderboard pages
title: chore: bulk docs refresh, cleanup, and repo restructure
